decks.notes: The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a combination of creature aggression and combat tricks. By playing efficient creatures like Leatherhead, Swamp Stalker and Badgermole Cub alongside combat enhancers like Practiced Offense and Seam Rip, the deck aims to quickly close out games before the opponent can stabilize. Multiversal Passage and Abandoned Air Temple provide flexibility and advantage, while cards like Surrak, Elusive Hunter and Brightglass Gearhulk offer powerful late-game threats. Overall, the key strategy is to apply constant pressure and maintain board presence to secure victories.

This deck focuses on quickly overwhelming the opponent with aggressive creatures and exploiting the potential of land cards. By utilizing mana ramp with Llanowar Elves and Fabled Passage, the deck aims to quickly build a board presence with cards like Badgermole Cub and Sazh's Chocobo. The key strategy is to maintain a steady stream of threats while also having options for card draw and control with cards like Keen-Eyed Curator and Earthbender Ascension. Overall, the deck aims to outpace the opponent and quickly defeat them through aggressive plays and board presence.

This deck focuses on manipulating the opponent's resources and controlling the board through a combination of removal spells and card draw. It aims to disrupt the opponent's game plan while building up its own resources with the help of mana acceleration and card advantage. The key strategy is to outvalue the opponent by efficiently using removal spells and drawing cards to maintain control of the game. Additionally, the deck utilizes powerful creatures like Thor, God of Thunder to pressure the opponent and close out the game quickly.

This UR Aggro deck focuses on quickly overwhelming opponents with aggressive creatures and instant spells to control the tempo of the game. By combining efficient threats like Colorstorm Stallion and Eddymurk Crab with burn spells like Burst Lightning and Flow State, the deck aims to steadily chip away at the opponent's life total while also maintaining board control. With a strong emphasis on evasion with Slickshot Show-Off and protection with Spell Pierce, this deck aims to close out games swiftly before the opponent can stabilize.

The main focus of this deck is to control the opponent's actions and resources through a combination of card advantage, removal spells, and disruption. By using cards like Tablet of Discovery and Jeskai Revelation to draw extra cards, along with counterspells like Deadly Cover-Up and Duress to disrupt the opponent's game plan, the deck aims to grind out value and outlast the opponent. Additionally, cards like Sear and Firebending Lesson provide targeted removal options, while cards like Bleachbone Verge and Inevitable Defeat help to control the board and prevent the opponent from developing a strong presence.

The main focus of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of powerful creatures and spells while maintaining control over the battlefield. By using cards like S.H.I.E.L.D. Spy Kit and Spell Pierce to disrupt the opponent's strategy and protect your own creatures, combined with powerful enchantments like Ethereal Armor and No More Lies to boost your creatures' strength, this Azorius Aggro deck aims to quickly build a strong board presence and apply pressure to the opponent. The deck also includes cards like Shardmage's Rescue and Sheltered by Ghosts to protect your creatures from removal spells and maintain dominance on the battlefield.

This deck focuses on utilizing a combination of spell cards and creatures to control the board and outvalue the opponent. By combining powerful control tools like Abandon Attachments and Combustion Technique with card draw like Accumulate Wisdom and Jeskai Revelation, the deck aims to maintain board advantage and answer threats before they become a problem. With synergistic cards like Firebending Lesson and Gran-Gran, the deck can generate value over time and overwhelm the opponent. The inclusion of powerful finishers like Thor, God of Thunder helps secure the game once the deck has gained control.

The main focus of this UR Aggro deck is to quickly establish board presence and deal damage efficiently. Utilizing cheap spells like Burst Lightning and Opt, along with creatures like Slickshot Show-Off and Eddymurk Crab, the deck aims to apply pressure on the opponent early on. The inclusion of cards like Spell Pierce and Vibrant Outburst helps to protect the board and maintain momentum. With a mix of aggressive creatures and disruptive spells, this deck aims to overwhelm opponents and secure a swift victory.

The main concept of this deck is to utilize a combination of cards to strategically bring powerful creatures back from the graveyard, while also disrupting the opponent's plans with control spells and hand disruption. By using Doomsday Excruciator and other reanimation spells, the deck aims to overwhelm the opponent with high-value creatures like Emeritus of Ideation and Superior Spider-Man while maintaining control of the game with cards like Bitter Triumph and Duress. Strategic Betrayal and Day of Black Sun provide additional flexibility and removal options to ensure the deck's success in 1 vs 1 matchups.

The main concept of this deck is to quickly fill your graveyard with powerful creatures and then bring them back onto the battlefield using reanimation spells like Doomsday Excruciator and Requiting Hex. By utilizing cards like Winternight Stories and Bitter Triumph to facilitate this strategy, you can overwhelm your opponent with strong creatures while disrupting their game plan with cards like Duress and Deadly Cover-Up. Superior Spider-Man and M.O.D.O.K. provide additional value and threats, while cards like Strategic Betrayal and Hidden Lair offer versatile utility to control the game and secure victory.

This deck focuses on using a variety of control spells and creatures to manipulate the game and disrupt the opponent's strategy. It combines burn spells like Burst Lightning with cards like Eddymurk Crab and Traumatic Critique to control the board and limit the opponent's options. The inclusion of cards like Opt and Sleight of Hand help to dig for key cards and maintain card advantage. The goal is to outmaneuver the opponent and ultimately overwhelm them with efficient removal and powerful creatures while maintaining a steady stream of card advantage.

The main idea of this Izzet Control deck is to disrupt your opponent's strategy and control the pace of the game through a combination of countermagic, card draw, and removal spells. By utilizing cards like Spell Pierce, Spell Snare, and Impractical Joke, you can hinder your opponent's plays while setting up your own win condition using cards like Winternight Stories and Hearth Elemental. The deck also focuses on tempo plays and resource management, making it crucial to carefully plan your moves and anticipate your opponent's actions.

This deck focuses on maximizing its resources and creating pressure on the opponent through quick, efficient plays. It relies on cheap spells and creatures with evasion to deal damage consistently. The deck also includes bounce spells to disrupt the opponent's board state and maintain tempo. By efficiently utilizing its mana and card advantage, this deck aims to close out the game quickly before the opponent can stabilize. It prioritizes flexibility and adaptability, allowing the player to adjust their strategy based on the opponent's plays.

The main focus of this deck is to control the game through a combination of removal, counterspells, and card advantage. By using cards like Duress and Requiting Hex to disrupt your opponent's plans, along with Superior Spider-Man and Doomsday Excruciator to apply pressure, you aim to outlast and outsmart your opponent. Additionally, the inclusion of cards like Deadly Cover-Up and Strategic Betrayal give you the flexibility to handle a variety of threats. Overall, the goal is to establish dominance over the game and steadily grind down your opponent's resources.

The main concept of this Selesnya Aggro deck is to overwhelm your opponent with a combination of efficient creatures and combat tricks. By utilizing cards like Practiced Offense and Brightglass Gearhulk, you can quickly build a board presence and apply pressure to your opponent. Additionally, cards like Hushwood Verge and Llanowar Elves provide mana acceleration to help you play your threats ahead of schedule. The deck aims to maintain a fast-paced and aggressive strategy, utilizing the synergy between its creatures and combat spells to secure a swift victory.

The main concept of this Izzet Control deck is to maintain control of the game through a mix of removal spells, counterspells, and card advantage. The deck aims to slow down the opponent's game plan with cards like Burst Lightning, Impractical Joke, and Traumatic Critique, while also generating card advantage through Opt, Sleight of Hand, and Winternight Stories. With powerful threats like Hearth Elemental and Sunderflock to close out the game, the deck aims to outvalue and outlast the opponent in a battle of attrition.
